text:
TARDIS Setup
Once you have obtained your TARDIS Exterior Shell, you may be tempted to attempt a first flight, this, however, will get you killed as you undoubtedly realize you haven't even installed basic life support systems yet.
 First you must create and install subsystems which will create an environment habitable by Minecraftians, which include the following:
- Artificial Gravity Generators
- Oxygen Recyclers
- Atmospheric pressurizer
Once you have installed the life support systems, you then must create the Console Unit and subsystems necessary to refueling your TARDIS, as its life support systems cannot run without power! (This is called foreshadowing wink wink)
